title: Galaxy Shooter Pro
description: Unity-based 2D arcade shooter optimized for WebGL. Designed enemy waves, bosses and power-ups; implemented keyboard and touch controls; performance-tuned browser builds; added scoring and persistence. Build located in the repository at galaxy-shoter-pro/ (Unity WebGL).

title: Augmented Reality Research
description: Researched object trajectory prediction using AR and computer vision. Presented at UNIP Annual Research Convention (2013).

title: Mobile-Controlled Wheelchair Prototype
description: Capstone project: Built integrated hardware+software prototype for Bluetooth-based remote control. Showcased at campus outreach event.

title: DevDex Portfolio
description: Pokédex-style portfolio with retro terminal aesthetic. Pure HTML/CSS/JS with dynamic JSON data loading.
